# AWS CloudFormation template for a complete application stack including VPC (Virtual Private Network), EC2 instance, RDS DBInstance with automated backups enabled/a S3 bucket configured as an endpoint of data transfer between instances and buckets in Amazon S3. A LoadBalancer is also created to ensure seamless traffic distribution among multiple resources such as the Instances running on them or their direct customers

          CidrBlock : "CIDR_YOUR"
